title: Gau Rakshak Killed In Mathura On Eid: Protesters Say Murdered By Smugglers, Cops Call It Accident; CM Yogi Orders Crackdown
description: The killing of prominent ‘Gau Rakshak’ known across the region as ‘Farsa Wale Baba’ has sparked widespread outrage and sorrow among local residents, causing tensions to escalate throughout the region. While Baba's supporters call it murder, the cops stated that the it was an 'accident'.
